spec.emotional_state: hopeful, made some progress on a goal
spec.label: A02_same_day

profile.personality: curious but reserved; thinks before replying; warms up after a few turns

transcript.content: Hi Priyansh, it's a lovely warm morning here! I hope you had a good cricket game with friends last week. Tell me, did you try any new moves on the field since then?
Yes, actually I tried a new fielding position. My friend said I look like Yuvraj Singh now. Not sure if I caught well, but it was fun. How about you, did you watch any Bollywood movie recently?

Hi Priyansh, that sounds exciting! Trying new positions is a great way to improve. Yuvraj Singh is a legend — you're on the right path! I watched a movie last week, but I can't remember the name. Did you see it?
No, I haven't watched it. Oh, by the way, I joined a new cricket startup last week. They make smart gloves for fielders. It's an exciting project!
That is very cool! Smart gloves for fielders — sounds like it helps catch the ball better. Are you working on the software part of it? Tell me more.

Yes, I'm working on the software. The gloves have sensors that track hand movements and give feedback. It's early days, but I'm hopeful. Btw, which Bollywood movie did you watch? I should check it out.
I watched "Jawan" last week. It’s a new movie with Shah Rukh Khan. The story is about a soldier — very emotional. You should watch it if you like action and drama. Have you seen it?

No, I haven’t seen *Jawan* yet, but I love SRK’s action movies. I’ll add it to my watch list. By the way, do you follow cricket? The gloves project is still in testing, but I’m hopeful it’ll help players improve. Maybe you can try them someday!
You work on something very exciting! It’s cool how tech helps sports improve. I follow cricket a little — I know SRK is a big fan too. Tell me, what’s the biggest challenge with your project so far?

The biggest challenge is making the sensors accurate in all conditions — like rain or sand. Also, the software needs to process data fast so players get real-time feedback. It’s tricky but we’re working on it. *Chal chal*, small steps!
You're doing great, just a tiny tweak — we say "small steps lead to big wins!" Your project sounds tough but very important. I admire that. What’s the next step for you and your team?

Next step is to test the gloves with real players and collect feedback. We want to make sure it’s useful for all skill levels — from kids to pros. Hope to start trials in a few weeks. *Acha lag raha hai*!
You're doing great! "Acha lag raha hai" — it shows you're excited. Testing with real players is a big win. Tell me, how do you feel about working on such a creative idea?

Honestly, it feels *bada awesome*! Sometimes I get nervous if the idea is too techy or not user-friendly, but when I see a player try the gloves and smile, it all makes sense. Excited but also learning a lot. Gotta go — talk to you later, Maya!
You're doing great! "Bada awesome" — I like that! It's normal to feel nervous, but your excitement shines through. Talk to you soon! Tell me how the trials go.
